title: Formulas across multiple columns and pulses
excerpt: Hi, we’re trying to create a cashflow board which has previously been maintained using Excel. We have hit a point where our columns all have forumals and are all working, however there are situations where a column needs…

posts.author: CWoolfe (Catherine Woolfe)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, we’re trying to create a cashflow board which has previously been maintained using Excel. We have hit a point where our columns all have forumals and are all working, however there are situations where a column needs to display a value that would be the result of one pulse + a different pulse in different columns. Is this possible?

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@CWoolfe,

Without knowing the details, you can not directly reference another item using monday formulas.

However, it can be done using mirror columns, a custom app, or Integromat (or similar).
